title: Stipa stenophylla
taxonomy: Stipa stenophylla is classified within the family Poaceae, which is a group of plants commonly known as grasses. This classification places it alongside other grass species. The genus Stipa itself is a group of grasses that are often referred to as feather grasses or needle grasses. Stipa stenophylla is further classified into the tribe Stipeae, a group of grasses that share similar characteristics. At the species level, Stipa stenophylla is a unique and distinct species within its genus.

intro: Stipa stenophylla, also known as Needle Grass, is a species of grass native to Australia, characterized by its slender leaves and delicate appearance. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress.
